title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses how software engineering roles are changing with AI adoption. The episode covers tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal PCs, and challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as students enter transformed workplaces.
